MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JOSE LORENZO ITZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-27-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. REPRESENTED BY BERENICE MEDINA, SENIOR CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE LORENZO ITZA RODRIGUEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JOSE LORENZO ITZA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,675.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
